name: Amazon Store Card

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on Amazon.com purchases for Prime members
1.5% cash back on Amazon.com purchases for non-Prime members

other_benefits.name: Special financing
other_benefits.description: Special financing options on qualifying purchases (6, 12, or 24 months - note: deferred interest if not paid in full)

other_benefits.name: Prime member deals
other_benefits.description: Access to exclusive deals for Prime members

notes: Store card (not Visa/MC). Can only be used at Amazon. Special financing offers changing after Feb 2026. Not a traditional credit card.
